# Step 09: GSVA 全通路活性评分

## 09.1 GSVA 矩阵与差异通路

```{r}
ensure_module_result_layout("09_gsva")

de_result <- restore_main_de_result(required = TRUE)
gsva_expr_source <- if (!is.null(gene_logcpm) && identical(colnames(gene_logcpm), colnames(gene_exp))) gene_logcpm else log2(gene_exp + 1)
gsva_expr_mat <- make_gene_symbol_matrix(gsva_expr_source, de_result)
gsva_group_factor <- factor(sample_info[colnames(gsva_expr_mat), "group"], levels = c(group1_label, group2_label))

run_gsva_score_matrix <- function(expr_mat, gene_sets, min_size = 10, max_size = 500) {
  gene_sets <- lapply(gene_sets, function(x) unique(intersect(as.character(x), rownames(expr_mat))))
  gene_sets <- gene_sets[lengths(gene_sets) >= min_size & lengths(gene_sets) <= max_size]
  if (length(gene_sets) == 0 || nrow(expr_mat) < 100 || ncol(expr_mat) < 4) {
    return(matrix(numeric(0), nrow = 0, ncol = ncol(expr_mat), dimnames = list(character(0), colnames(expr_mat))))
  }
  res <- tryCatch({
    if ("gsvaParam" %in% getNamespaceExports("GSVA")) {
      param <- GSVA::gsvaParam(
        exprData = as.matrix(expr_mat),
        geneSets = gene_sets,
        minSize = min_size,
        maxSize = max_size,
        kcdf = "Gaussian"
      )
      GSVA::gsva(param, verbose = FALSE)
    } else {
      GSVA::gsva(
        expr = as.matrix(expr_mat),
        gset.idx.list = gene_sets,
        method = "gsva",
        kcdf = "Gaussian",
        min.sz = min_size,
        max.sz = max_size,
        verbose = FALSE
      )
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("GSVA method failed, fallback to ssGSEA: ", conditionMessage(e))
    run_ssgsea_matrix(expr_mat, gene_sets, min_size = min_size, max_size = max_size)
  })
  as.matrix(res)
}

write_gsva_matrix <- function(mat, path) {
  if (is.null(mat)) {
    mat <- matrix(numeric(0), nrow = 0, ncol = ncol(gsva_expr_mat), dimnames = list(character(0), colnames(gsva_expr_mat)))
  }
  write.table(mat, path, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, col.names = NA)
}

run_gsva_diff <- function(mat, family_label) {
  diff_tbl <- run_limma_contrast_table(mat, gsva_group_factor, group1_label, group2_label)
  if (nrow(diff_tbl) == 0) {
    return(data.frame(
      pathway = character(),
      logFC = numeric(),
      AveExpr = numeric(),
      t = numeric(),
      P.Value = numeric(),
      adj.P.Val = numeric(),
      B = numeric(),
      family = character(),
      significant = logical(),
      direction = character(),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
  diff_tbl %>%
    rownames_to_column("pathway") %>%
    mutate(
      family = family_label,
      # 保留当前项目 nominal pvalue < 0.05 的通路活性探索性筛选口径；正式报告建议同步查看 adj.P.Val/FDR。
      significant = !is.na(P.Value) & P.Value < 0.05,
      direction = case_when(
        significant & logFC > 0 ~ paste0("higher_in_", group2_label),
        significant & logFC < 0 ~ paste0("higher_in_", group1_label),
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(P.Value, desc(abs(logFC)))
}

gsva_status <- data.frame(step = "initialization", status = "started", detail = "", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
if (nrow(gsva_expr_mat) < 100 || ncol(gsva_expr_mat) < 4) {
  gsva_status <- data.frame(step = "input", status = "skipped", detail = "symbol-level expression matrix too small", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  hallmark_gsva <- kegg_gsva <- reactome_gsva <- c5_gsva <- matrix(numeric(0), nrow = 0, ncol = ncol(gsva_expr_mat), dimnames = list(character(0), colnames(gsva_expr_mat)))
} else {
  hallmark_sets <- build_msig_symbol_sets("H")
  kegg_sets <- build_msig_symbol_sets("C2", c("CP:KEGG", "CP:KEGG_LEGACY", "CP:KEGG_MEDICUS"))
  reactome_sets <- build_msig_symbol_sets("C2", "CP:REACTOME")
  c5_sets <- build_msig_symbol_sets("C5")

  hallmark_gsva <- run_gsva_score_matrix(gsva_expr_mat, hallmark_sets)
  kegg_gsva <- run_gsva_score_matrix(gsva_expr_mat, kegg_sets)
  reactome_gsva <- run_gsva_score_matrix(gsva_expr_mat, reactome_sets)
  c5_gsva <- run_gsva_score_matrix(gsva_expr_mat, c5_sets)
  gsva_status <- data.frame(
    step = "gsva",
    status = "ok",
    detail = paste0("H=", nrow(hallmark_gsva), ";KEGG=", nrow(kegg_gsva), ";Reactome=", nrow(reactome_gsva), ";C5=", nrow(c5_gsva)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

hallmark_gsva_diff <- run_gsva_diff(hallmark_gsva, "Hallmark")
kegg_gsva_diff <- run_gsva_diff(kegg_gsva, "KEGG")
reactome_gsva_diff <- run_gsva_diff(reactome_gsva, "Reactome")
c5_gsva_diff <- run_gsva_diff(c5_gsva, "MSigDB_C5")

write_gsva_matrix(hallmark_gsva, "result/09_gsva/09_1_Hallmark_GSVA_matrix.tsv")
write_gsva_matrix(kegg_gsva, "result/09_gsva/09_2_KEGG_GSVA_matrix.tsv")
write_gsva_matrix(reactome_gsva, "result/09_gsva/09_3_Reactome_GSVA_matrix.tsv")
write_gsva_matrix(c5_gsva, "result/09_gsva/09_4_MSigDB_C5_GSVA_matrix.tsv")
write.csv(hallmark_gsva_diff, "result/09_gsva/09_5_Hallmark_GSVA_differential.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(kegg_gsva_diff, "result/09_gsva/09_6_KEGG_GSVA_differential.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(reactome_gsva_diff, "result/09_gsva/09_7_Reactome_GSVA_differential.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(c5_gsva_diff, "result/09_gsva/09_8_MSigDB_C5_GSVA_differential.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(gsva_status, "result/09_gsva/09_0_GSVA_status.csv", row.names = FALSE)

gsva_leading_summary <- bind_rows(hallmark_gsva_diff, kegg_gsva_diff, reactome_gsva_diff, c5_gsva_diff) %>%
  filter(is.finite(P.Value)) %>%
  group_by(family, direction) %>%
  arrange(P.Value, desc(abs(logFC)), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  ungroup()
write.csv(gsva_leading_summary, "result/09_gsva/09_9_leading_GSVA_pathway_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

## 09.2 GSVA 图表

```{r}
top_gsva_pathways <- gsva_leading_summary %>%
  arrange(P.Value, desc(abs(logFC))) %>%
  slice_head(n = 30) %>%
  pull(pathway) %>%
  unique()

gsva_heat_mat <- rbind(
  hallmark_gsva[rownames(hallmark_gsva) %in% top_gsva_pathways, , drop = FALSE],
  kegg_gsva[rownames(kegg_gsva) %in% top_gsva_pathways, , drop = FALSE],
  reactome_gsva[rownames(reactome_gsva) %in% top_gsva_pathways, , drop = FALSE],
  c5_gsva[rownames(c5_gsva) %in% top_gsva_pathways, , drop = FALSE]
)
if (nrow(gsva_heat_mat) >= 2) {
  gsva_heat_scaled <- safe_scale_rows(gsva_heat_mat)
  save_base_pdf_versions(
    primary = "result/09_gsva/09_10_GSVA_pathway_activity_heatmap.pdf",
    width = 10,
    height = 10,
    expr = ComplexHeatmap::draw(
      ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(
        gsva_heat_scaled,
        name = "z-score",
        col = heatmap_diverging_col_fun(gsva_heat_scaled),
        top_annotation = heatmap_group_annotation(sample_info[colnames(gsva_heat_scaled), "group"]),
        cluster_rows = TRUE,
        cluster_columns = TRUE,
        column_names_rot = 45
      )
    )
  )
}

if (nrow(gsva_leading_summary) > 0) {
  gsva_bar_tbl <- gsva_leading_summary %>%
    group_by(family) %>%
    arrange(P.Value, desc(abs(logFC)), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    slice_head(n = 8) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(pathway_label = factor(paste(family, pathway, sep = " | "), levels = rev(unique(paste(family, pathway, sep = " | ")))))
  gsva_bar <- ggplot(gsva_bar_tbl, aes(x = pathway_label, y = logFC, fill = family)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.75) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = "Differential GSVA pathway activities", x = NULL, y = paste0(group2_label, " - ", group1_label, " GSVA logFC")) +
    theme_rnaseq_minimal()
  save_plot_versions(gsva_bar, "result/09_gsva/09_11_GSVA_differential_barplot.pdf", width = 10, height = 9)
}
```

## 09.3 GSVA 与 WGCNA 模块 eigengene 关联

```{r}
gsva_module_cor_long <- data.frame()
if ((!exists("me_df") || nrow(me_df) == 0) && file.exists(cache_12_wgcna_path)) {
  wgcna_state <- readRDS(cache_12_wgcna_path)
  me_df <- wgcna_state$me_df %||% data.frame()
}

if (exists("me_df") && is.data.frame(me_df) && nrow(me_df) > 0 && nrow(gsva_heat_mat) >= 2) {
  module_cols <- grep("^Module_", colnames(me_df), value = TRUE)
  common_samples <- intersect(colnames(gsva_heat_mat), me_df$sample)
  if (length(module_cols) >= 1 && length(common_samples) >= 4) {
    module_mat <- t(as.matrix(me_df[match(common_samples, me_df$sample), module_cols, drop = FALSE]))
    colnames(module_mat) <- common_samples
    pathway_mat <- gsva_heat_mat[, common_samples, drop = FALSE]
    cor_mat <- cor(t(module_mat), t(pathway_mat), use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
    gsva_module_cor_long <- as.data.frame(cor_mat) %>%
      rownames_to_column("Module") %>%
      pivot_longer(-Module, names_to = "pathway", values_to = "correlation") %>%
      arrange(desc(abs(correlation)))
    write.csv(gsva_module_cor_long, "result/09_gsva/09_12_GSVA_WGCNA_module_correlation.csv", row.names = FALSE)
    save_base_pdf_versions(
      primary = "result/09_gsva/09_13_GSVA_WGCNA_module_correlation_heatmap.pdf",
      width = 10,
      height = 8,
      expr = ComplexHeatmap::draw(
        ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(
          cor_mat,
          name = "r",
          col = heatmap_diverging_col_fun(cor_mat, midpoint = 0),
          cluster_rows = TRUE,
          cluster_columns = TRUE
        )
      )
    )
  }
}
if (nrow(gsva_module_cor_long) == 0) {
  write.csv(data.frame(status = "skipped_wgcna_eigengene_or_gsva_matrix_unavailable"), "result/09_gsva/09_12_GSVA_WGCNA_module_correlation.csv", row.names = FALSE)
}

saveRDS(
  list(
    hallmark_gsva = hallmark_gsva,
    kegg_gsva = kegg_gsva,
    reactome_gsva = reactome_gsva,
    c5_gsva = c5_gsva,
    gsva_leading_summary = gsva_leading_summary,
    gsva_module_cor_long = gsva_module_cor_long,
    generated_at = as.character(Sys.time())
  ),
  cache_09_gsva_state_path
)
```
